# Purpose
This template captures the outcome of a completed implementation task in a consistent, reusable format.
It exists so humans and AI agents can record what changed, why it changed, and what remains unresolved after major work.
AI agents should copy this template into a task-specific completion note when a meaningful implementation milestone finishes.

# Maintenance Instructions
Update this template when the team changes how implementation handoffs or completion reviews are documented.
Humans and AI agents may refine it, but keep the structure stable so historical completion notes stay comparable.
Keep it aligned with [docs/tasks.md](../tasks.md) and [docs/design/design.md](../design/design.md).

# TASK-<ID>-COMPLETION

## Overview
- Task ID:
- Task title:
- Summary of work completed:

## Technical Decisions Made
- Decision 1:
- Decision 2:
- Decision 3:

## File Structure
- Files created:
- Files updated:
- Files intentionally left untouched:

## Validation
- Checks performed:
- Results:

## Known Issues
- Issue 1:
- Issue 2:

## Tech Debt
- Debt item 1:
- Debt item 2:

## Lessons Learned
- Lesson 1:
- Lesson 2:

## Recommended Follow-up
- Next task:
- Documentation updates needed:
